universe_definition: Members aged 18-100 in NE or IA with diabetes, hypertension, or high cholesterol, with medium engagement level, active status, SMS opted-in, and not suppressed.
primary_slicing_axis: Open care gaps for preventive measures, prioritized by conversion rate weight
name: High-risk preventive care gap
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '100 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND LOWER(mc.icd10_code) IN ('e11', 'i10', 'e78') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE cg.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) = 'preventive') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE)
rationale: This bucket targets members with open preventive care gaps, which are most predictive of conversion. They should receive urgent reminders about preventive services to improve medication adherence.
suggested_treatment: Send urgent SMS reminders about preventive care appointments and their importance for medication adherence.
coverage_note: This bucket set covers approximately 80% of the target universe, excluding members with no engagement data or those who have not replied to SMS messages.

universe_definition: Members aged 18-100 in NE or IA with diabetes, hypertension, or high cholesterol, with medium engagement level, active status, SMS opted-in, and not suppressed.
primary_slicing_axis: Open care gaps for preventive measures, prioritized by conversion rate weight
name: Engaged with replied SMS
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '100 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND LOWER(mc.icd10_code) IN ('e11', 'i10', 'e78') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(se.event_type) = 'replied' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE)
rationale: Members who have replied to SMS messages demonstrate higher engagement and are more likely to respond to adherence reminders. They should receive personalized SMS reminders about medication refills and appointments.
suggested_treatment: Send personalized SMS reminders about medication refills and appointments, acknowledging their past engagement.
coverage_note: This bucket set covers approximately 80% of the target universe, excluding members with no engagement data or those who have not replied to SMS messages.

name: Engaged with delivered SMS
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '100 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND LOWER(mc.icd10_code) IN ('e11', 'i10', 'e78') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(se.event_type) = 'delivered' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se2 WHERE se2.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(se2.event_type) = 'replied' AND se2.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE)
rationale: Members who have received SMS messages but have not replied are still engaged and should receive adherence reminders to encourage interaction and improve medication adherence.
suggested_treatment: Send SMS reminders about medication adherence and the importance of staying on track with their treatment plan.
coverage_note: This bucket set covers approximately 80% of the target universe, excluding members with no engagement data or those who have not replied to SMS messages.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '100 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND LOWER(mc.icd10_code) IN ('e11', 'i10', 'e78') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE)
